mapper.sql: id AS document_id, application_id, document_type, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_hash, ocr_status, parse_result_json, uploaded_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uploaded_document (application_id, document_type, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_hash, ocr_status, parse_result_json, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{documentType}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{ocrStatus}, #{parseResultJson}, #{uploadedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM uploaded_document WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY uploaded_at, id
